name: ongrid
description: An ops AI Agent that understands your infrastructure, finds the root cause, and fixes it — right from Slack, Telegram, Lark or DingTalk.
summaryZh: An ops AI Agent that understands your infrastructure, finds the root cause, and fixes it — right from Slack, Telegram, Lark or DingTalk. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
